Combine ER plot components

combine_er_components.Rd

Combine ER plot components

Usage

combine_er_components(
  components,
  heights = NULL,
  add_caption = !is.null(components$caption),
  ...
)

Arguments

components

An object of class er_plot_components returned by plot_er() or plot_er_gof() with return_components = TRUE or options_orig_data = list(return_components = TRUE).

heights

Numeric vector of length 2 specifying the relative heights of the main plot and boxplot. If NULL (default), uses the height from the metadata (based on boxplot_height parameter).

add_caption

Logical, whether to add the caption to the combined plot. Default is TRUE if caption is available.

...

Additional arguments passed to patchwork::wrap_plots().

Value

A combined ggplot object.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Get components
comps <- plot_er_gof(ermod_bin, return_components = TRUE)

# Modify components
comps$main <- comps$main + labs(title = "Custom Title")

# Recombine
combine_er_components(comps)
} # }
